meta_descriptions.summary: 6+ important pages have no meta description. Yoast SEO is installed but descriptions are not written for utility and navigation pages.

h1_analysis.summary: H1 tags are generally appropriate. The homepage H1 'Cash Loans in Sydney' targets a local keyword correctly. One note: location pages use very long, descriptive H1s that are fine for content but less clean for search intent.

typo_found.issue: Title tag contains 'Tweed Headss' (double s) — critical typo to fix

homepage.issue: H2 tags are marketing slogans (FAST, FLEXIBLE, RELIABLE) rather than descriptive heading text. These provide zero semantic value to search engines and break the logical document outline.

product_pages.pattern: Payday Loans page has H2: 'Fast and Flexible Payday Loans in Australia' — acceptable
product_pages.issue: Consistent 'FAST / FLEXIBLE / RELIABLE' H2 block repeated on every page template is duplicate decorative heading content

word_count.summary: Product pages are well-developed (2800–3200 words). Main branch location pages are adequate (1997–2616). Non-branch virtual service area pages are thin (1534–1632 words) and 98%+ similar to each other.

virtual_service_area_pages.finding: CRITICAL: 20+ virtual service area pages (non-branch locations like Albury, Dubbo, Tamworth, Geelong, Cairns, etc.) are 98–99% identical to each other. Only the city name changes. This is near-clone content and creates a large duplicate content cluster that could trigger quality penalties.

loan_amount_pages.finding: HIGH: The 9 loan amount pages ($500 through $5000) are 92–96% identical to each other. Only the dollar amount changes. These are near-duplicate pages with minimal differentiation.

main_location_pages.finding: MODERATE: Main branch location pages (Gosford, Wollongong, Tweed Heads) are 71–78% similar to each other. Each has some unique introductory content but shares identical template sections.

homepage.finding: 2 images missing alt text on homepage. Images with missing alt text cannot be indexed by Google Images and fail WCAG 1.1.1 accessibility requirements.

internal_linking.finding: Product pages and location pages are not cross-linked. The payday-loans page does not link to Gosford, Wollongong, or Tweed Heads location pages. Location pages do not link to relevant product pages (e.g., Gosford page doesn't link to /loans/payday-loans/ or /loans/loans-for-people-on-centrelink/). This creates two isolated content silos that don't pass authority to each other.
internal_linking.note: CTAs are functional and frequent — good for conversion intent

gsc_performance_signals.note: GA4 not available. Using GSC 90-day baseline from init.

top_pages_by_clicks.note: Old URL — 404. Traffic going to 404 page. SEO value being lost.

Old URL — 404. Traffic going to 404 page. SEO value being lost.

gsc_performance_signals.critical_finding: The top 4 GSC pages by clicks are ALL 404 pages. The site has apparently migrated URLs (from /gosford/ to /service-areas/gosford/ and /centrelink-loans/ to /loans/loans-for-people-on-centrelink/) but has NOT set up 301 redirects. GSC is showing traffic from users who bookmarked or linked to the old URLs. These 301 redirects are the single highest-priority fix on the entire site.

issues_priority.issue: /gosford/ returns 404 — was top GSC page (456 clicks/90d)
